name: Investigate Bug
description: Walks a reported bug from description to fix: reads the repo, reproduces the issue, diagnoses root cause, proposes a fix for your approval, then implements it, tests it, and opens a PR. Uses backend-architect for diagnosis & implementation, feedback-synthesizer to translate the bug report into a concrete reproduction, test-writer-fixer to verify the fix.
